allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./src/modules/celpip/_01_data/celpipMockTests.js'\).then\(m=>{const want={'Problem Solving':8,'Daily Life Conversation':5,Information:6,'News Item':5,Discussion:8,Viewpoints:6};let bad=0;for\(const t of m.CELPIP_MOCK_TESTS.listening\){if\(t.questions.length!==want[t.type]\){bad++;console.log\('COUNT OFF',t.id,t.type,t.questions.length\)}}console.log\('question-count mismatches:',bad\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/modules/celpip/_01_data/celpipMockTests.js'\).then\(m=>{let bad=0;for\(const t of m.CELPIP_MOCK_TESTS.listening\){if\(t.segments\){const sum=t.segments.reduce\(\(a,s\)=>a+s.q,0\);if\(sum!==t.questions.length\){bad++;console.log\('SEG SUM OFF',t.id,sum,'vs',t.questions.length\)}if\(!t.transcript\)console.log\('NO TRANSCRIPT',t.id\)}}console.log\('PS segmented sets:',m.CELPIP_MOCK_TESTS.listening.filter\(t=>t.segments\).length\);console.log\('segment-sum mismatches:',bad\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/modules/celpip/_01_data/celpipMockTests.js'\).then\(m=>{const L=m.CELPIP_MOCK_TESTS.listening;let issues=0;for\(const t of L\){const segs=t.segments||[{q:t.questions.length}];const sum=segs.reduce\(\(a,s\)=>a+s.q,0\);if\(sum!==t.questions.length\){issues++;console.log\('seg-sum',t.id\)}for\(const q of t.questions\){if\(!q.options.includes\(q.answer\)\){issues++;console.log\('ans',t.id\)}}if\(!t.transcript\){issues++;console.log\('no-transcript',t.id\)}}console.log\('listening sets',L.length,'PS segmented',L.filter\(t=>t.segments\).length,'issues',issues\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/modules/celpip/_01_data/celpipMockTests.js'\).then\(m=>{const L=m.CELPIP_MOCK_TESTS.listening;const want={'Problem Solving':8,'Daily Life Conversation':5,Information:6,'News Item':5,Discussion:8,Viewpoints:6};const counts={};let issues=0;for\(const t of L\){counts[t.type]=\(counts[t.type]||0\)+1;if\(t.questions.length!==want[t.type]\){issues++;console.log\('count off',t.id\)}for\(const q of t.questions\){if\(!q.options.includes\(q.answer\)\){issues++;console.log\('ans',t.id\)}}if\(!t.transcript\){issues++;console.log\('no transcript',t.id\)}}const totalQ=L.reduce\(\(a,t\)=>a+t.questions.length,0\);console.log\('total listening sets:',L.length\);console.log\('by type:',counts\);console.log\('total questions:',totalQ\);console.log\('issues:',issues\)}\)")
